title: Choice Action Selection Result
description: Normalized selection result for a completed ChoiceActionRequest. Identifies the request, selected choice, selection mode, and render method, independent of the harness presentation widget.

requestId.description: Matches the request id of the original choice/action request.

choiceId.description: The id of the selected choice.

canonicalValue.description: The canonical value of the selected choice, preserved from the request.

inputMode.description: How the user input was captured.

renderMode.description: How the harness presented the choices.
